seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with BeeAI + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with BeeAI + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Email Assistant with BeeAI enables intelligent email processing, intent detection, draft generation, and approval workflows using IBM's production-ready agent framework. However, high-risk operations like PII handling, recipient validation, and content generation demand robust guardrails to prevent data leaks, inappropriate communications, and compliance violations. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure reliability across long email sessions and complex tool interactions.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with BeeAI
architectureOverview.description:
The AI Email Assistant follows a modular BeeAI agent architecture with distinct components for email intake, intent classification, content generation, and approval workflows. Incoming emails trigger the agent via BeeAI's event bus, where the Granite model performs intent detection (reply, forward, delegate) and extracts action parameters. Tools handle attachment processing, recipient validation, and draft generation, with state persisted across multi-turn conversations.

Memory management tracks conversation context and user preferences, while the approval workflow integrates human-in-the-loop for send confirmation. BeeAI's observability layer captures agent events for monitoring, where Vex registers as an event listener to enforce verifications like PII filtering and tone analysis before email transmission.

The architecture scales for high-volume inboxes with async processing and supports multiple email protocols via pluggable tools.
architectureOverview.diagram:
┌─────────────────┐    ┌──────────────────┐
│   Email Intake  │───▶│   BeeAI Agent    │
│   (IMAP/API)    │    │  + Intent Detect │
└─────────────────┘    │  + Granite LLM   │
                       │  + Memory Store  │
                       └──────┬───────────┘
                              │
                ┌─────────────▼─────────────┐
                │     Tool Execution       │
                │ - Draft Generation       │
                │ - Attachment Processing  │
                │ - Recipient Validation   │
                └─────────────┬─────────────┘
                             │
                    ┌────────▼────────┐
                    │   Vex Guardrails│
                    │ - PII Filter    │
                    │ - Tone Check    │
                    │ - Approval Flow │
                    └─────────────────┘

risks.name: Unbounded Agent Memory Growth
risks.description: Long email threads cause memory bloat, leading to inconsistent intent detection and draft generation.
risks.mitigation: Vex monitors memory usage and triggers context summarization after 10k tokens.

risks.name: PII Leakage in Drafts
risks.description: Granite model outputs unfiltered PII from attachments or email bodies into generated responses.
risks.mitigation: Real-time PII entity extraction and redaction before send approval.

risks.name: Tool Injection via Malicious Emails
risks.description: Crafted email content bypasses tool parameter validation, enabling unauthorized actions.
risks.mitigation: Strict schema validation on all tool inputs with allowlist enforcement.

risks.name: Tone Inappropriateness
risks.description: Model generates unprofessional or offensive language unsuitable for business communication.
risks.mitigation: Sentiment analysis and professionalism scoring before draft finalization.

implementation.title: Email Intent Detection Agent
implementation.description: Core BeeAI agent that classifies email intent and extracts action parameters using Granite model.

implementation.title: Draft Generation Tool
implementation.description: Generates email response drafts with context from conversation memory.
implementation.code:
from beeai.tools import Tool

class DraftGenerator(Tool):
    name = "generate_draft"
    description = "Generate professional email draft"
    
    def execute(self, intent: str, context: str, recipient: str) -> str:
        prompt = f"Write professional {intent} to {recipient}: {context}"
        response = self.agent.model.generate(prompt)
        return response.text

intent_agent.register_tool(DraftGenerator())

implementation.title: Attachment Processing Tool
implementation.description: Safely extracts text from email attachments for intent analysis.

implementation.title: Recipient Validation Tool
implementation.description: Validates email recipients against company directory to prevent external leaks.

vexIntegration.title: Register Vex Event Listener
vexIntegration.description: Hook Vex into BeeAI's event system to monitor all agent actions and tool calls.

vexIntegration.title: Memory Growth Guardrail
vexIntegration.description: Prevents unbounded memory expansion during long email conversations.

vexIntegration.title: Email Send Approval Workflow
vexIntegration.description: Final verification layer combining all checks before email transmission.
